title: calamintha alpina subsp. elatior
intro: Calamintha alpina subsp. elatior, commonly known as mountain calamintha or elatior calamintha, is a subspecies of perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It belongs to the mint family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calamintha alpina subsp. elatior include relief from digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to soothe and calm the mind. This plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
